subcodes.first_line: ...The Word of God may be likened to the life-giving breezes of the divine springtime. When chanted in spiritual tones, it bestoweth the breath of life
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه نفحات الله نغمه زار و آه شرربارت چنان شعله بر افروخت که قلب اهل
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
